hero.secondary: The dating app that breaks the ice: games, places, events and communities to build real connections.

modals.test_body: Join the community: beta access, direct chats with the team and the first members.
modals.beta_ios_step1: Download <tf>TestFlight</tf>, Apple's official app, from the App Store.
modals.beta_ios_step2: Join the <tg>Telegram</tg> group or the <wa>WhatsApp</wa> channel, then tap the invite link.
modals.beta_ios_step3: Everything's ready — you can test Kiro!
modals.beta_android_desc: No extra app to download: join the <tg>Telegram</tg> group or the <wa>WhatsApp</wa> channel, tap the link, and Google Play opens directly to install the app.

concept.title: Kiro: engineering authentic connections.
concept.intro: Traditional dating apps are broken: snap judgments, empty profiles, awkward conversations. Kiro flips the industry on its head. We don't just help you match — we walk you to the table of your first date.
concept.quote: Kiro doesn't just connect you. Kiro sets the stage for you.
concept.point1_desc: No more empty profiles. Compatibility starts with our Big Five psychology test.
concept.point2_desc: Safely reconnect with people who love your favorite spots (gym, café...).
concept.point3_desc: No more awkward “hey”s. Our built-in mini-games spark attraction, pressure-free.
concept.point4_desc: Kiro suggests spots, syncs your calendars and plans your real-life date.

games.title: Attraction can't be forced. It's played.
games.desc: Blank-page anxiety and ignored “hey”s are a thing of the past. Kiro swaps first-message stress for the thrill of play. Discover our interactive experiences, designed to turn simple curiosity into a real connection.
games.game1_title: Match 5: the spark of common ground
games.game1_text: Five targeted questions to measure your compatibility in real time. Instantly see what brings you together — as a percentage. Answered the exact opposite? Perfect. The algorithm will point it out with a wink: opposites often make the best stories.
games.game2_title:
Truth or Dare,
zero filter, 100% spontaneous
games.game2_text: Why be forgettable when you can be memorable? This reinvented classic is the ultimate weapon for starting a conversation effortlessly. Funny, bold or deep — it's the shortcut to grabbing attention and making interest skyrocket in seconds.
games.game3_title: Guess my number: the art of the comeback
games.game3_text: Conversation running out of steam? Don't let silence settle in. Launch this quick mental challenge to warm up the mood and spark curiosity. The goal is simple, the effect immediate: you revive the complicity, lighten the air and put fun back at the center.
games.game4_title: Perfect Date: your passport to real life
games.game4_text: The final test before meeting in person. Do you really know the person you're talking to? Prove it. Score at least 70% and the virtual stops here: Kiro takes over and instantly offers to plan your first real date.

plans.title: Free to start, more if you want
plans.desc: A complete free plan for the essentials of Kiro, and three plans to go further. Prices and offers shown in the app prevail.
plans.free_desc: Discovery, matches, chat and icebreaker games, with daily quotas.
plans.standard_desc: More Flames, messages and translations every day, Super Flames and premium challenges.
plans.premium_desc: See who liked you, advanced filters, incognito mode and speed dating.
plans.max_desc: No limits: maximum quotas, boost included, priority support and exclusive badges.

cta.title: Ready to meet differently?
cta.desc: The beta is open. Join the community and try Kiro today.

chatdemo.title: The art of the comeback, effortlessly.
chatdemo.desc: Stop telling your life story — live the moment. Watch how one dare turns small talk into seduction.
chatdemo.msg1: Truth or Dare? No room for error on your first pick. 😏
chatdemo.msg2: Truth. I fear nothing. Ask away.
chatdemo.msg3: Perfect. Describe your ideal date — emojis ONLY. ⏳
chatdemo.msg5: An Italian dinner at sunset, then a jazz club? Okay, you just scored major points... 🔥

kiroplaces.title: First dates that already have an address
kiroplaces.desc: Cafés, restaurants, festivals, iconic spots: add your favorite places to your profile and find the people who already live them. Only the place name is visible — never a private address, never a dot on a map.
kiroplaces.note: Residential addresses and sensitive places are automatically rejected.
